product.title: Estée Lauder Futurist Hydra Rescue Moisturizing Foundation Makeup SPF 45 for a 12-Hour Glow, 1.2 Fl Oz

primaryFeatures.color: 3N1 Ivory Beige - Medium with neutral undertones

featureBullets: FOUNDATION + SKINCARE: Futurist is flawless foundation, powered with high-performance Estée Lauder skincare. Soothes and reduces visible redness and irritation for a healthy, radiant look. It nourishes and hydrates. Improves skin’s moisture barrier.
HIGHLIGHTED INGREDIENTS: Nourishing Chia-Seed Extract, Soothing Probiotic Technology and Hydrating IonCharged Water Complex.
POWERFUL SPF: Provides broad spectrum UVA/UVB protection with SPF 45.
MADE WITHOUT: This skin-loving foundation is free of parabens, phthalates, drying alcohols and mineral oil.
POWER YOUR GLOW WITH FUTURIST: Discover the complete Futurist Collection of skincaring makeup, powered by science. Reveal radiant, beautiful skin—now and in the future.

specification.value: 3N1 Ivory Beige - Medium with neutral undertones
SOOTHES redness & irritation. PROTECTS from pollution with antioxidants + SPF 45. HYDRATES instantly, all day.
#7,839 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #90 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation provides good coverage without lines or creases, and appreciate its hydrating properties that keep skin moisturized throughout the day. The product receives positive feedback for its lightweight, natural-looking finish, and its effectiveness for aging skin. While many customers say the color matches their skin perfectly, some report it's not the right shade for them.

reviews.reviewText: Great coverage and makes your skin look natural! I'm an "old dog" and I have used every makeup there is and this makeup makes me look like I am 25! No kidding! I am lucky to have great skin. My Mom showed me how to take care of it when I was young. I was a swimmer most of my life and skied all over the place and back then there was no sun screen available. This makeup is light and has full coverage! Its awesome! I apply it with a makeup brush and it is flawless! I love it!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 31, 2026

productSpecs.color: 2N2 Buff - Light-medium with neutral subtle golden undertones

reviews.reviewText: I've been using this make-up for several years and I really like it. It goes on smoothly and has excellent coverage, but not too heavy and it doesn't dry out my skin.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 22, 2026

productSpecs.color: 2C3 Fresco - Light-medium with cool rosy beige undertones

reviews.reviewText: I’ve been using this makeup for about 8 months. I used to use Dior Backstage Face and Body makeup, but never could find a color that matched my skin exactly. This makeup has similar buildable coverage, and I use 1N2 in the winter when I’m pale, and 3C2 in the summer. The colors are perfect, and it also has SPF45. I live 20 minutes from the Gulf and have worn this makeup as sunscreen at the beach, it keeps my face from burning. I love that this makeup has a dewy look, and it’s also moisturizing. I use all Estée Lauder skincare (I’m 52 and recommend the Revitalizing Supreme + night power bounce cream and Re-nutriv ultimate diamond sculpted transformation crème). The skincare plus this makeup has made a HUGE difference in my face and especially my neck, all my lines and wrinkles are gone. You get what you pay for!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 2, 2025

productSpecs.color: 1N2 Ecru - Light with cool rosy-peach undertones

reviews.customer: Flush was unbearable, could not take

productSpecs.color: 2C3 Fresco - Light-medium with cool rosy beige undertones

reviews.reviewTitle: Could be better could be worse
reviews.reviewText: Pretty good for every day, but could definitely be improved. The shade range could be better, they need to make more fair cool shades. I use 1c1 and it’s pretty dark for being the lightest shade. When it’s first applied it looks like a good shade match, but it oxidizes heavily almost immediately. I have to make sure to blend it out really well or it’s noticeable. Luckily when it’s blended out I can get away with it even though it’s not a perfect match. The formula feels nice on the skin. It’s light coverage, and I don’t recommend trying to build the coverage or it will become cakey and greasy. I also notice it becoming patchy throughout the day in my dry spots, which is weird because it’s a glowy foundation and my matte foundation (Banila co coverlicious) doesn’t do that. It’s good for a daily light makeup look (especially because of the spf), but I wouldn’t recommend it if you’re looking for something more “flawless.”
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 30, 2026
